game_name: Shadow Dancer: The Secret of Shinobi

special_mechanics.name: Dog Companion Attack
special_mechanics.description: Player-controlled ninja accompanied by dog Yamato. Dog attacks enemies when player holds attack button until meter fills; dog only attacks when barking towards nearby enemy. Can attack while standing and jumping.

special_mechanics.name: Jumping Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Player jumps down from building in bonus stage, shoots enemies while airborne

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative). Sources contain gameplay mechanics description and critical reception noting 'far more responsive' control system, but no quantified physics parameters (velocities, acceleration values, frame data). No technical documentation on sub-pixel systems or precise movement values available.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Shadow Dancer: The Secret of Shinobi
